reviews.comment:
Cargo porqué me queda de paso, para volver a mi domicilio, aunque es incómoda porqué es chica ya que está cerca de calles principales, siempre hay poca gente atendiendo en los surtidores, aunque tiene gente tal vez mal administrada.

(Translated by Google)
I charge because it's on my way back home, although it's inconvenient because it's small and close to main streets. There are always few people serving at the pumps, although there are people who are perhaps poorly managed.

reviewReply.comment: Tendremos muy en cuenta su opinión, lo esperamos de nuevo!!!!

reviews.comment:
No me gusta la atención.
Disconforme con el uso de sanitarios, no nos dejaron ocupar sin la anterioridad de comprar algo. Ojalá que a los dueños nunca les pase lo mismo. Dicen de tener en cuenta la opinión y no lo hacen. En fin, un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the service. I was dissatisfied with the use of the restrooms; they wouldn't let us use them without buying something first. I hope the owners never have to go through the same thing. They say they value our opinions, but they don't. In short, a disaster.

reviewReply.comment: Le informamos que el uso de los sanitarios es  exclusivo para socios y clientes

reviews.comment:
Mucha demora en los playeros y de mal humor,deberían mandarlos hacer un curso sobre atención al público,entiendo que sufren altas temperaturas pero eso no debe afectar al trato a los clientes

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are taking a long time and are in a bad mood. They should be sent to take a course on customer service. I understand that they are suffering from high temperatures, but that shouldn't affect their customer service.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por visitarnos, tendremos muy en cuenta su opinión!!
